description.zh-Hans: 自动识别透明主体或角落背景色，裁掉空白并将素材居中、落地或顶部对齐。
description.en: Detects transparent subjects or corner backgrounds, removes empty space and aligns the sprite consistently.

triggers.zh-Hans: 自动裁剪, 主体居中, 角色落地, 去除空白, 智能取景
triggers.en: auto crop, center sprite, ground alignment, remove empty space

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: AI 生成或导入素材后先取景，再连接像素整理节点。
exampleUsage.en: Use after imported or generated art, then connect Smart Pixel Polish.
